ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instructions" (
  "instruction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instruction */,
  "code" INTEGER /* The numerical code for the instruction */,
  "name" TEXT /* The name of the instruction */,
  "overflow" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if overflow can occur */,
  "instruction_type" TEXT /* Type of operation represented by the instruction (e.g., BL, B.W) */,
  "result_mask" TEXT /* Mask applied to the result of the instruction */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the instruction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instruction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the instruction */,
  "development_board_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the development board */,
  "microcontroller_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the microcontroller */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instruction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructions_result_mask FOREIGN KEY ("result_mask") REFERENCES result_masks ("mask_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructions_overflow FOREIGN KEY ("overflow") REFERENCES overflow_handling ("overflow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructions_microcontroller_id FOREIGN KEY ("microcontroller_id") REFERENCES microcontrollers ("microcontroller_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructions_instruction_type FOREIGN KEY ("instruction_type") REFERENCES instruction_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructions_development_board_id FOREIGN KEY ("development_board_id") REFERENCES development_boards ("board_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instruction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the instruction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instruction type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the instruction type (e.g., arithmetic, logical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "overflow_handling" (
  "overflow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for overflow handling method */,
  "overflow_condition" TEXT /* Description of the overflow condition */,
  "handling_method" TEXT /* Method of handling the overflow */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the overflow condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("overflow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "result_masks" (
  "mask_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result mask */,
  "mask_expression" TEXT /* Expression used for the result mask */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mask's usage */,
  "bit_length" INTEGER /* Length of the bit mask */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mask_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, reviewer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "development_boards" (
  "board_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each development board */,
  "board_name" TEXT /* Name of the development board */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the development board */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the development board was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the development board */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("board_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "microcontrollers" (
  "microcontroller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each microcontroller */,
  "microcontroller_name" TEXT /* Name of the microcontroller */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the microcontroller */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* Architecture of the microcontroller */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the microcontroller was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the microcontroller */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("microcontroller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruction_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of an instruction */,
  "instruction_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the instruction */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruction_versions_instruction_id FOREIGN KEY ("instruction_id") REFERENCES instructions ("instruction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
